message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

participant "SNS" as SNS #FF69B4
participant "Lambda" as Lambda #FFA500
participant "DynamoDB" as DynamoDB #4169E1

box "SNS" #FF69B4
    participant "Event Dispatcher Topic" as EventDispatcherTopic
end box

box "Lambda" #FFA500
    participant "Update Relationship Event Handler" as UpdateRelationshipEventHandler
end box

box "DynamoDB" #4169E1
    participant "Relationship Owner Table" as RelationshipOwnerTable
    participant "Relationship Commitment Table" as RelationshipCommitmentTable
end box

EventDispatcherTopic -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: filter on Relationship::Update Event
activate UpdateRelationshipEventHandler
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: [SessionDecorator.puml]
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: [TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: extract Message from Event
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: validate Message
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: validate event-name
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: validate event-version
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: validate stage
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> RelationshipOwnerTable: Get Existing Relationship
activate RelationshipOwnerTable
RelationshipOwnerTable --> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Generate Relationship Dict
deactivate RelationshipOwnerTable
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Combine Existing Relationship Attributes With New Changes

opt if missing required schema key
    UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Error Handling
end

UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Get AdditionalAttributes

alt if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes doesn't contain completed signal
    UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> RelationshipOwnerTable: update Relationship
    activate RelationshipOwnerTable
    RelationshipOwnerTable --> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Error Handling
    deactivate RelationshipOwnerTable
end

UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Generate commitments to add or delete

alt if Commitment Operations Exist
    UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Generate starting indexes based on AdditionalAttributes
    UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> RelationshipCommitmentTable: Batch_Write() RelationshipCommitments
    activate RelationshipCommitmentTable
    RelationshipCommitmentTable --> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Error Handling
    deactivate RelationshipCommitmentTable
end

UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Track Event Handler Wrapper
UpdateRelationshipEventHandler -> UpdateRelationshipEventHandler: Error Handler Wrapper
deactivate UpdateRelationshipEventHandler

@enduml
```
